description_long: This is a compact, four-wheeled all-terrain vehicle (ATV) with a robust and angular body design, primarily finished in a striking red color with black accents. The vehicle features a single, wide seat with a slightly raised rear section, suitable for one rider, and a set of large, thick tires designed for off-road use. The front end is equipped with two headlights and a small, angular front bumper, while the rear is streamlined with minimal overhang and two small taillights. The handlebars are straight and positioned for easy maneuvering, with visible hand grips and a central control cluster. The undercarriage and wheel wells are reinforced, suggesting durability for rough terrain. The overall build is sturdy, with a hard, glossy surface finish and visible suspension components typical of ATVs.
description: A red and black four-wheeled all-terrain vehicle with large off-road tires, a single seat, and straight handlebars. The design is angular and robust, built for durability and maneuverability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the ATV, highlighting the seat, large tires, and angular body panels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the straight handlebars, dual headlights, and the pointed front bumper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the seat, tires, and body contours.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the seat, rear fenders, and two small taillights.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose or uneven terrain, typical of all-terrain vehicles.
